A Lifetime of Healthy Smiles

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”medium-p”]We’ve been offering high quality family dentistry in the same location for 50 years. While our office decor has seen some updates and our technology has evolved with the times, our commitment to excellence and passion for helping families achieve outstanding oral health has remained the same.

Our expert dentists and friendly team deliver personalized care for children, teenagers and adults. Having one dentist for the whole family makes achieving healthy smiles convenient and stress-free. Come on in and see for yourself why we’ve been the dentist of choice in the Greer community for decades.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” Our Dental Services

We provide comprehensive, full-service family dentistry in Greer, SC. Our services include:

  • Professional Teeth Cleaning
  • Comprehensive Dental Exams
  • Oral Cancer Screenings
  • Fillings
  • Dental Sealants
  • Crowns and Bridgework
  • Root Canal Treatment
  • Periodontal (Gum) Disease Therapy
  • TMJ/TMD Treatment
  • Athletic Mouthguards
  • Dentures
  • Tooth Extractions
  • Cosmetic Dentistry, Including Whitening and Veneers
  • Emergency Dentistry

column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

A Prevention-Focused, Educational Approach

Our dentists are committed to educating families on oral health and hygiene, so they can keep their teeth and gums disease-free. We also focus heavily on prevention. That’s why, at visits, you or your children will receive comprehensive exams that include an oral cancer screening, assessment of the teeth and gums and, when needed, x-rays. We’ll then work with you to create a preventative care plan that suits whatever stage of life you’re in. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
